title: Smoky, Quick, Juicy Mediterranean Lamb Tagine
description: A smoky, spicy and aromatic tagine featuring lamb, with a flambe finish and a hint of Mediterranean flavors.
instructions: Brown the lamb in a large pan over medium-high heat, then set aside.
Reduce heat to medium, add olive oil, and sauté the onion until softened.
Add garlic, chilli flakes, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb back to the pan, then stir in the dried apricots and chicken broth.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook for 30 minutes.
Mix in the flour to thicken the sauce, then increase heat to medium and cook for 5 minutes.
Flambé the tagine by carefully adding 2 tablespoons of brandy or rum to the pan. Stand back and ignite the mixture.
Once the flames have died down, serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
